answer:
Here’s how you can reset your password:

1. Go to the login page on our website.
2. Click the **"Forgot Password"** link.
3. Enter the email address associated with your account.
4. Check your email for a password reset link (it will expire after 30 minutes).

---
Sources used:
• [Policy: faq.md — Password Reset] "Customers can reset their password by clicking 'Forgot Password' on the login page. A reset link is emailed and expires after 30 minutes."
